payload.query: Most research on gender and electoral systems finds that women perform poorly in candidate-centered systems. Using existing research, evaluate this argument. Do you agree or disagree? Why?

articles.title: In an Age of Right-Wing Populism, Why Are Denmark’s Liberals Winning?
